gist.headline: Logging the good vibes
gist.blurb: A new privacy-first desktop tool called AI LOGS has sprouted in our community greenhouse. It uses AI to track your work habits and keep an eye on your wellbeing while you code.
gist.summary: Added AI LOGS, a privacy-first AI-powered desktop tool for tracking work habits and wellbeing, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use AI LOGS to gain insights into their productivity and local activity directly from the community greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'AI LOGS', a wellbeing and productivity tracker. Visuals should combine literal logs (wood) with data logs (charts/screens) and wellbeing motifs. Polly the bee holding a clipboard (tracking) next to a retro monitor showing a cozy chart, with a literal wooden log nearby.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny sweatband and holding a clipboard, standing next to a retro computer monitor displaying a glowing green productivity chart. A small pixelated wooden log sits on the desk next to a sprouting code-plant. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
